name: Sazon Preparado (Prepared Seasoning)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a blender.
2. Blend the mixture gradually until it forms a puree.
3. Pour the puree into a saucepan and simmer over low heat, stirring constantly for 5 minutes.
4. Allow the mixture to cool completely.
5. Bottle the seasoning for later use.
6. This prepared seasoning can be used to flavor stews, beans, rice, and vegetables. It's easy to make and handy to have on hand.
